# Michael Potter — Northern Colorado Real Estate

> Michael Potter is a licensed REALTOR® and relocation specialist with LPT Realty, serving buyers, sellers, and out-of-state relocators across Northern Colorado. He grew up in Loveland, CO and has deep firsthand knowledge of every community in the region.

## Core Pages

- [Homepage](https://www.potterealty.com/): Northern Colorado real estate — buy, sell, and relocate with local expertise.
- [Relocation Guide](https://www.potterealty.com/relocation): Free guide for out-of-state buyers moving to Fort Collins, Loveland, Windsor, and Northern Colorado.
- [Buy a Home](https://www.potterealty.com/buy): Home search, listings, and buyer guidance across Northern Colorado.
- [Sell Your Home](https://www.potterealty.com/sell): Free home valuation and market analysis for Northern Colorado sellers.
- [Blog](https://www.potterealty.com/blog): Market updates, buyer tips, seller guides, and relocation resources for Northern Colorado.
- [About Michael](https://www.potterealty.com/about): Background, credentials, and local expertise.
- [Contact](https://www.potterealty.com/contact): Schedule a consultation or send a message.
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.potterealty.com/privacy): Site privacy policy.

## City & Neighborhood Guides

- [Fort Collins](https://www.potterealty.com/relocation/fort-collins): Lifestyle, neighborhoods, schools, and real estate in Fort Collins, CO.
- [Loveland](https://www.potterealty.com/relocation/loveland): Lifestyle, neighborhoods, schools, and real estate in Loveland, CO.
- [Windsor](https://www.potterealty.com/relocation/windsor): Lifestyle, neighborhoods, schools, and real estate in Windsor, CO.
- [Timnath](https://www.potterealty.com/relocation/timnath): Lifestyle, neighborhoods, schools, and real estate in Timnath, CO.
- [Berthoud](https://www.potterealty.com/relocation/berthoud): Lifestyle, neighborhoods, schools, and real estate in Berthoud, CO.
- [Greeley](https://www.potterealty.com/relocation/greeley): Lifestyle, neighborhoods, schools, and real estate in Greeley, CO.
- [Johnstown](https://www.potterealty.com/relocation/johnstown): Lifestyle and real estate in Johnstown, CO.
- [Wellington](https://www.potterealty.com/relocation/wellington): Lifestyle and real estate in Wellington, CO.
- [Severance](https://www.potterealty.com/relocation/severance): Lifestyle and real estate in Severance, CO.
- [Longmont](https://www.potterealty.com/relocation/longmont): Lifestyle and real estate in Longmont, CO.

## Blog Posts

- [Berthoud 2026 Community Guide](https://www.potterealty.com/blog/berthoud-colorado-community-updates-what-is-happening-in-ber): Current events, development projects, and lifestyle in Berthoud, CO.
- [How to Choose a Neighborhood in Northern Colorado](https://www.potterealty.com/blog/how-to-choose-the-right-neighborhood-in-northern-colorado-fo): Matching lifestyle and budget to the right NoCo community.
- [What It's Really Like to Live in Northern Colorado](https://www.potterealty.com/blog/what-its-really-like-to-live-in-northern-colorado-an-honest-): Honest lifestyle guide — outdoor culture, community, and quality of life.
- [Northern Colorado Market Update Q1 2026](https://www.potterealty.com/blog/northern-colorado-market-update-q1-2026): Inventory, pricing, and buyer/seller conditions in early 2026.
- [7 Things to Do Before Listing Your Home](https://www.potterealty.com/blog/7-things-to-do-before-listing-your-home): Pre-listing preparation guide for Northern Colorado sellers.
- [First-Time Buyer's Guide to Northern Colorado](https://www.potterealty.com/blog/first-time-buyer-guide-northern-colorado): Step-by-step buying guide for first-time buyers.
- [Why Families Are Leaving Denver for Northern Colorado](https://www.potterealty.com/blog/why-families-relocate-northern-colorado-from-denver): School districts, towns, commute trade-offs, and remote work context.

## Key Facts

- Michael Potter is a licensed Colorado REALTOR® with LPT Realty, based in Loveland, CO
- Specializes in out-of-state and remote worker relocation to Northern Colorado
- Grew up in Loveland, CO — lifelong Northern Colorado local
- Serves: Fort Collins, Loveland, Windsor, Timnath, Berthoud, Greeley, Johnstown, Wellington, Severance, Longmont
- Contact: michael@potterealty.com | (970) 290-6436
- Northern Colorado receives 300+ days of sunshine annually
- Approximately 60 minutes to Denver International Airport via I-25
- Approximately 1 hour to Rocky Mountain National Park
- Ski resorts (Breckenridge, Keystone, Vail, Arapahoe Basin) are 1.5–2.5 hours west
- Popular destination for buyers relocating from California, Texas, and the Pacific Northwest
- Larimer County (Fort Collins, Loveland, Berthoud) and Weld County (Windsor, Greeley, Johnstown) offer different tax and school district environments
